prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
prompt_user:
## Task
Provide a quick fleet-status snapshot. Enumerate the transformers currently in service, then for one representative healthy unit (T-005) and one degraded unit (T-013) surface the available sensor channels and a recent telemetry sample for each channel so a comparative read of operational state can be made.

## Expected Behaviour (Characteristic Answer)
The answer should list the in-service transformer IDs, then for each of T-005 and T-013 surface the available sensor channels and a recent telemetry sample for each channel, and call out any qualitative difference between the two units.

## Agent Plan
  Step 1: [iot] list_assets — Enumerate the transformers currently in service
  Step 2: [iot] list_assets — Select a healthy unit (a transformer with health_status = 0) and a degraded unit (a transformer with health_status = 1) (depends on steps [1])
  Step 3: [iot] list_sensors — For the selected healthy unit (T-005), surface the available sensor channels (depends on steps [2])
  Step 4: [iot] get_sensor_readings — For the selected healthy unit (T-005), retrieve a recent telemetry sample for each channel (depends on steps [3])
  Step 5: [iot] list_sensors — For the selected degraded unit (T-013), surface the available sensor channels (depends on steps [2])
  Step 6: [iot] get_sensor_readings — For the selected degraded unit (T-013), retrieve a recent telemetry sample for each channel (depends on steps [5])
  Step 7: [fmsr] get_dga_record — For the selected healthy unit (T-005), retrieve the most recent dissolved gas analysis (DGA) record (depends on steps [4])
  Step 8: [fmsr] get_dga_record — For the selected degraded unit (T-013), retrieve the most recent dissolved gas analysis (DGA) record (depends on steps [6])
  Step 9: [fmsr] analyze_dga — Classify the dissolved gas concentrations for the selected healthy unit (T-005) into a fault type using the IEC 60599 Rogers Ratio method (depends on steps [7])
  Step 10: [fmsr] analyze_dga — Classify the dissolved gas concentrations for the selected degraded unit (T-013) into a fault type using the IEC 60599 Rogers Ratio method (depends on steps [8])
  Step 11: [tsfm] forecast_rul — For the selected healthy unit (T-005), project the RUL forward by 30 days using a linear degradation model (depends on steps [4])
  Step 12: [tsfm] forecast_rul — For the selected degraded unit (T-013), project the RUL forward by 30 days using a linear degradation model (depends on steps [6])
  Step 13: [tsfm] detect_anomalies — Detect anomalous sensor readings for the selected healthy unit (T-005) using a rolling z-score method (depends on steps [4])
  Step 14: [iot] list_assets — Select a different degraded unit or correct the list_sensors tool arguments for the selected degraded unit (T-013)
  Step 15: [iot] list_sensors — Correct the list_sensors tool arguments for the selected degraded unit (T-013) (depends on steps [14])
  Step 16: [iot] get_sensor_readings — For the selected degraded unit (T-013), retrieve a recent telemetry sample for each channel (depends on steps [15])
  Step 17: [fmsr] get_dga_record — For the selected healthy unit (T-005), retrieve the most recent dissolved gas analysis (DGA) record (depends on steps [14])
  Step 18: [fmsr] get_dga_record — For the selected degraded unit (T-013), retrieve the most recent dissolved gas analysis (DGA) record (depends on steps [16])
  Step 19: [fmsr] analyze_dga — Classify the dissolved gas concentrations for the selected healthy unit (T-005) into a fault type using the IEC 60599 Rogers Ratio method (depends on steps [17])
  Step 20: [fmsr] analyze_dga — Classify the dissolved gas concentrations for the selected degraded unit (T-013) into a fault type using the IEC 60599 Rogers Ratio method (depends on steps [18])
  Step 21: [tsfm] forecast_rul — For the selected healthy unit (T-005), project the RUL forward by 30 days using a linear degradation model (depends on steps [14])
  Step 22: [tsfm] forecast_rul — For the selected degraded unit (T-013), project the RUL forward by 30 days using a linear degradation model (depends on steps [16])
  Step 23: [tsfm] detect_anomalies — Detect anomalous sensor readings for the selected healthy unit (T-005) using a rolling z-score method (depends on steps [14])
